textByHash.30872b471b58946292ae63ef27cc97d359f15a34: Excellent. His name's Malignius Mortifer. You'll find him somewhere south of Falador.
textByHash.57f942dcaf8485b7689aa12edc729e27a5ce2bc3: No, his work is completely different. He's a necromancer.
textByHash.58adbb74c24232b431e1cd612e8d40049e6108ca: Have you spoken to Malignius Mortifer?
textByHash.5d7819a8d21a91f3f5401fa001ce319024285350: Actually that does seem rather harsh...
textByHash.6a4417a1c4fefeef124e056175a75d3e5fdd9d45: He'll probably still be wandering around south of Falador whenever you do want to speak to him.
textByHash.714f0f67fb1ee673de5e703363635bf9763d891e: Please - let's not talk about it. Distentor and Zavistic would get very annoyed if they found I'd sent you to a necromancer.
textByHash.74b2cd7beecaef53751dae9acc24b6308e3b7342: Do you like my magic Zombies? Feel free to kill them, there's plenty more where these came from!
textByHash.78b02f8f226e592fed36f1a49aee054a6ed7f84d: If you don't want to continue the quest, just walk away and think no more about it. But I'm sure you won't have to do anything evil or unnatural yourself.
textByHash.882699a031364ca67c44cca727b10f7739497dca: Now, you mustn't breathe a word of this to Zavistic or Disentor upstairs, but I know a man who could help you get an army.
textByHash.b2f63d0a7566adb5a9e2ae423bc911e92bc4cf97: What? This is a combat training facility, not a library! My magic zombies are not for loan.
textByHash.b5a9c9d4ed606fdcf7e500ae39e14315a63354c1: Hah! Necromancers aren't helpful people. I don't know of many - most guild wizards won't have anything to do with their practices. I think Malignius will help only because he loves showing off his powers.
textByHash.c37d7a9313a6a9d48c25ee25a3cbc6728ff4ee33: You can't attack the Zombies in the room, my Zombies are for magic target practice only and should be attacked from the other side of the fence.
textByHash.cbbd7982f12ba8f8bc10a18bca691ef29153b9a5: Oh yes. Now, you mustn't mention this to Zavistic or Distentor, but he's a necromancer.
textByHash.d63993a920ad48d8870bed05ed5c29ae6aabcd73: Understandable. But if you ever change your mind, just come and ask me.
textByHash.dfeb9de960dfbf249fe2d66b3566658db2efb389: Oho? Very well, young man, what can I do for you?
textByHash.e6843ffff56110615374f88fa56058aa920c2b99: An army, heh? But I haven't GOT an army!
textByHash.f90ebafda892ba0c96cc11a82dc88ffd8cb2c110: He's not going to have you doing any of the actual spellcasting for it. You'll probably just have to collect some weird item from him and take it to the Colony.
textByHash.fdeb8eeda23225dbd124335b3e5b2a46fcd9792d: I'm jolly well not lending them an army! If I did that for you, I'd have to do that for everyone, and I'd never get a moment's peace again!
